nasb.text: The Pharisees and some of the scribes gathered around Him when they had come from Jerusalem,

esv.text: Now when the Pharisees gathered to him, with some of the scribes who had come from Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 有法利賽人和幾個經學家從耶路撒冷來，聚集到耶穌那裡。

ccb.text: 有法利赛人和一些律法教师从耶路撒冷来见耶稣。

csbs.text: 有些法利赛人和一些从耶路撒冷来的经文士聚集到耶稣那里。
